Headline: #60 Blue Island/26th Temporary Westbound Reroute near Harrison/Halsted
ShortDescription: Westbound #60 Blue Island/26th buses are temporarily rerouted via Harrison, Halsted, Van Buren, Morgan and Harrison due to street blockage near Harrison/Halsted

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

Westbound #60 Blue Island/26th buses are temporarily rerouted via Harrison, Halsted, Van Buren, Morgan and Harrison, then resume their normal route.

Eastbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to street blockage near Harrison/Halsted.

Headline: #79 79th Temporary Reroute near near 79th/Prairie
ShortDescription: #79 79th buses rerouted EB via 79th, State, 76th, King Drive & 79th; WB via 79th, King Drive, 76th, Lafayette & 79th due to police activity near 79th/Prairie.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

#79 79th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions.

Eastbound #79 79th buses will operate via 79th, State, 76th, King Drive, then resume their normal route on 79th.

Westbound #79 79th buses will operate via 79th, King Drive, 76th, Lafayette, then resume their normal route on 79th.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to police activity near 79th/Prairie.

Headline: No Trains Between Sox-35th and 63rd/Dan Ryan
ShortDescription: Red Line service is still temporarily suspended between Sox-35th and 63rd/Dan Ryan due to police activity at 47th/Dan Ryan.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Red Line service is still temporarily suspended between Sox-35th and 63rd/Dan Ryan due to police activity at 47th/Dan Ryan.

As a result, trains are operating in two sections:

  • between Howard and Sox-35th, and,
  • between 63rd/Dan Ryan and 95th/Dan Ryan, only.

Shuttle buses are available to provide connecting service between Sox-35th and 63rd/Dan Ryan, in both directions.

Consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes or using buses to other rail lines. These may include: #47 47th buses.

See station personnel for further assistance, and pay attention to announcements on trains and at stations for service information.

We are working to restore service as quickly as possible. Allow extra travel time.
